name: anti-vibe-coding
description: Plugin de desenvolvimento disciplinado com conhecimentos de programador senior. v7.2.0 — agent-skills-import (Waves 1/2/3) + compound-engineering-skill-port. WAVE 1: CI test-plugin-install.yml (3 jobs serie) + 3 references seed (security/accessibility/testing) + 2 skills novas (incremental-implementation, code-simplification) + Common Rationalizations + Red Flags em 5+ skills criticas + Hypothesis+Confidence+GUESS refactor em grill-me. WAVE 2: 13 agentes refinados para subagent-contract v2.0.0 (gold standard security-auditor; 12 demais em 3 waves paralelas) + validator anti-generico em agents/_contract/ + 3 skills novas (source-driven-development, doubt-driven-development, git-workflow-and-versioning) + pedagogia ADR (When to Write an ADR + lifecycle) em decision-registry. WAVE 3: consolidacao /anti-vibe-review -> /verify-work (deprecation grace period) + Prove-It Mode no tdd-verifier (red-confirmed/already-green/inconclusive + 6 fixtures) + 3 references (init-step-contract, hooks-checklist, tdd-cycle-checklist) com criterio de promocao compound->reference + frontmatter referenced-by em 5 compound notes-origem + Test Sizes/DAMP-vs-DRY/Test-Doubles em tdd-workflow + Task Sizing/Dependency Graph em plan-feature + Pipeline de Trabalho flowchart em AGENTS.md. COMPOUND-ENGINEERING-SKILL-PORT: nova skill user-invocable com 4 subcomandos (install skip-by-default + --force / check + --strict / migrate nao-destrutivo / gate via Skill tool nativa para lessons-learned) + bug fix MH-01 schema canonico (title/category/tags/created) em compound/README.md.tpl + 10 templates git mv para skills/compound-engineering/assets/ (linhagem preservada via 2-commits) + 2 libs canonicas cross-skill + patches P1/P2 idempotentes (AGENTS.md, new-plan.ts.tpl) + completion signal SH-07. Total: 38 skills indexadas (+5 vs 7.1.0).
